data.title: EPI (Holdings) Limited Announces Change in Share Registrar
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

An announcement from EPI (Holdings) Limited ( (HK:0689) ) is now available.

EPI (Holdings) Limited has announced a change in its Hong Kong branch share registrar and transfer office. Effective from March 31, 2025, Tricor Investor Services Limited will take over these responsibilities. This change means that applications for the registration of transfer of shares should be directed to Tricor Investor Services Limited starting from this date. The transition is expected to streamline the process for shareholders and align with the company’s operational adjustments.

More about EPI (Holdings) Limited

data.title: BioFish Concludes Fourth Exercise Period for Warrants
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

The latest update is out from Biofish Holding AS ( (DE:9R2) ).

BioFish Holding AS recently concluded its Fourth Exercise Period for warrants issued in 2023, allowing holders to subscribe for new shares at NOK 1.20. A preliminary count shows 1,893,608 warrants exercised, with further warrant exercise opportunities available biannually until January 2026, potentially impacting the company’s capital structure and market positioning.

More about Biofish Holding AS

BioFish is a Norwegian independent producer specializing in high-quality smolt and post-smolt production. The company operates a RAS production facility in Ljones, near the Hardangerfjord on Norway’s west coast, with proximity to numerous fish farming sites.

YTD Price Performance: 39.53%

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: €12.56M

Meditr Tower ( (IL:MDTR) ) just unveiled an update.

Meditr Tower Ltd. announced the successful completion of a private placement offering, issuing 200 million new ordinary shares priced at NIS 100 each, generating gross proceeds of NIS 200 million. These shares will begin trading on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange on February 18, 2025, marking a strategic move to enhance the company’s market presence and liquidity.

data.title: Global Lithium Resources Ltd Announces New Board Appointments
data.description:
Maximize Your Portfolio with Data Driven Insights:

  • Leverage the power of TipRanks' Smart Score, a data-driven tool to help you uncover top performing stocks and make informed investment decisions.
  • Monitor your stock picks and compare them to top Wall Street Analysts' recommendations with Your Smart Portfolio

Global Lithium Resources Ltd. ( (AU:GL1) ) has issued an announcement.

Global Lithium Resources Ltd has announced the appointment of new directors to its board, including Mr. Richard O’Shannassy as Non-Executive Chair, Mr. Liaoliang (Leon) Zhu as Executive Director, and Dr. Xiaoxuan (David) Sun as Non-Executive Director. These appointments are expected to strengthen the company’s leadership as it continues to develop its lithium projects in Western Australia, potentially bolstering its position in the global lithium industry and enhancing stakeholder confidence.

More about Global Lithium Resources Ltd.

Global Lithium Resources Ltd is a diversified lithium exploration and development company based in Western Australia. The company focuses on key lithium projects, including the 100% owned Manna Lithium Project in the Goldfields and the Marble Bar Lithium Project in the Pilbara region. With a combined Indicated and Inferred Mineral Resource of 69.6 million tonnes at 1.0% Li2O, Global Lithium is positioned as a significant player in the global lithium market.

YTD Price Performance: 27.78%

Average Trading Volume: 155,287

Mineral Resources Limited ( (AU:MIN) ) has issued an announcement.

Mineral Resources Limited has released its FY25 half-year results, highlighting financial data and performance metrics under Australian Accounting Standards. The announcement emphasizes the company’s adherence to the Australasian Joint Ore Reserves Committee Code for reporting and includes non-IFRS financial measures like EBITDA to provide insights into their business performance. The release also contains forward-looking statements about growth opportunities, project timelines, and financial forecasts, though it cautions stakeholders about potential risks and uncertainties which might affect future performance.

More about Mineral Resources Limited

Mineral Resources Limited is an Australian company operating in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company primarily deals in commodities and is subject to Australian Accounting Standards in its financial reporting.

An update from Spheria Emerging Cos. Ltd. ( (AU:SEC) ) is now available.

Spheria Emerging Companies Limited has released an estimate of its Pre-tax Net Tangible Asset (NTA) backing per share as of February 17, 2025, valued at $2.557. This unaudited and approximate figure reflects the company’s portfolio value adjusted for management fees, performance fees, and operational costs. These updates are crucial for investors tracking the company’s financial health and market positioning.
